heading: Sale of meals by general messes
label: 8247 Sale of meals by general messes
text: Under such regulations as the Secretary of the Navy prescribes, meals may be sold by general messes afloat and ashore.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)6087.34 U.S.C. 915b(c), .Aug. 2, 1946, ch. 756, § 16(c)60 Stat. 855
